Hero.title: Cultivating transparency, harvesting trust.
Hero.subtitle: The blockchain platform securing the governance of agricultural cooperatives in Togo and opening the doors to financing.

stats.loans: share of bank loans reaching agriculture

Hero.balanceNote: Audited by all members in real time

About.title: About CoopLedger
About.description: CoopLedger is a blockchain-based platform designed to restore trust in Togolese agricultural cooperatives. Born from the MIABE Hackathon, we address the critical issues of transparency, embezzlement, and financial exclusion that affect thousands of farmers.

mission.title: Mission
mission.text: Bring transparency to every cooperative through immutable technology.

vision.title: Vision
vision.text: A Togo where every farmer can trust their cooperative.

approach.title: Approach
approach.text: Technology at the service of community.

HowItWorks.title: How It Works
HowItWorks.description: A simple 4-step process to transform your cooperative governance.

join.title: Join the Network
join.text: Register your cooperative and its members on the platform.

record.title: Record Transactions
record.text: Every income and expense is recorded on the blockchain.

vote.title: Vote on Decisions
vote.text: Members participate in democratic decisions through smart contracts.

track.title: Track in Real-Time
track.text: Follow the financial health of your cooperative anytime.

benefits.growth: Access to bank financing and donors

Features.title: Platform Features
Features.description: Everything you need to manage a transparent cooperative.

why.speed: Settle transactions in seconds, not weeks
why.cost: Reduce operational costs by up to 60%

ledger.title: Immutable Ledger
ledger.text: All transactions are permanent and tamper-proof.

dashboard.title: Live Dashboard
dashboard.text: Real-time financial insights for all members.

Problem.title: Why CoopLedger is Essential
Problem.description: The lack of transparency is not just an administrative problem, it is a brake on rural development.

opacity.title: Opacity
opacity.text: 60%+ of Togolese cooperatives manage their accounting solely on paper/cash.

risk.title: Embezzlement Risk
risk.text: 15 to 20% of collective funds are embezzled every year.

trust.title: Mistrust
trust.text: 70% of members cite lack of transparency as the primary reason for mistrust.

exclusion.title: Financial Exclusion
exclusion.text: Only 0.2% of bank loans are granted to the agricultural sector.

Solution.title: The Trust Machine
Solution.description: We use blockchain technology to transform mistrust into certainty.

ledger.title: Immutable Ledger
ledger.text: Every transaction is etched into the blockchain, making any falsification impossible.

democracy.title: Digital Democracy
democracy.text: Members vote on expenses via secure Smart Contracts.

visibility.title: Real-time Visibility
visibility.text: A dashboard accessible to all members to track the financial health of their cooperative.

Impact.title: Social Impact
Impact.description: More than a technical tool, a growth lever for farmers.

revenue.title: Revenue Increase
revenue.text: Increased farmer incomes by 30 to 50% through sound management and collective buying.

funding.title: Funding Access
funding.text: Transparent cooperatives raise an average of 3 times more external funds (Banks, IFAD).

UseCases.title: Use Cases
UseCases.description: How Togolese cooperatives are using CoopLedger today.

seeds.title: Seed Procurement
seeds.text: Track collective seed purchases and distributions transparently.

equipment.title: Equipment Sharing
equipment.text: Manage shared farm equipment and maintenance costs.

training.title: Farmer Training
training.text: Fund and track agricultural training programs.

storage.title: Storage & Sales
storage.text: Record harvest storage and collective sales.

Partners.title: Our Partners
Partners.description: CoopLedger works with leading institutions to maximize impact.
Partners.cta_text: Join the transformation of Togolese agriculture.
Partners.support_text: Different types of support available for your cooperative:

Footer.slogan: For a prosperous and transparent Togolese agriculture.

form.title: Institutional contact form
form.text: Are you a ministry, donor, bank or development partner? Let us design a pilot tailored to your cooperative network.
form.name: Institution name
form.message: Tell us your objective, region, and expected deployment timeline.

Media.title: Real Stories from the Field
Media.description: Concrete examples from agricultural cooperatives, with video explainers and photos of day-to-day governance.

finance.title: How transparent finance unlocks credit
finance.text: Banks lend faster when transactions and votes are verifiable.

coops.title: Digital tools for farmer organizations
coops.text: Member-led governance improves payment discipline and trust.

meeting.title: General assembly with full traceability
meeting.text: Each member can verify decisions, signatures and payment statuses.

harvest.title: Harvest financing managed collectively
harvest.text: Inputs and reimbursements are tracked by campaign and village.

logistics.title: Storage and logistics monitoring
logistics.text: Stock movements are shared instantly with leaders and members.
